title: The role of explainability in creating trustworthy artificial intelligence for health care: a comprehensive survey of the terminology, design choices, and evaluation strategies

openAccessPdf.disclaimer: Notice: Paper or abstract available at https://arxiv.org/abs/2007.15911, which is subject to the license by the author or copyright owner provided with this content. Please go to the source to verify the license and copyright information for your use.

tldr.text: It is concluded that explainable modelling can contribute to trustworthy AI, but the benefits of explainability still need to be proven in practice and complementary measures might be needed to create trustworthy AI in health care.
